title: RGMCET General Campus Amenities
content: RGMCET provides essential campus amenities including banking, healthcare, food services, and communication facilities to support students and staff.

canteen.description: Canteen facility provides snacks, coffee, tea, and refreshments throughout college hours.

title: RGMCET Central Library Overview
content: The RGMCET Central Library is housed in a fully air-conditioned three-storied building with a large collection of books, journals, digital resources, and internet facilities for students and faculty.

floors.ground_floor: Book issue section including SC/ST book bank collections.
floors.first_floor: Reference section with encyclopedias, dictionaries, and prescribed textbooks for in-library use.
floors.second_floor: Journals section, digital library, discussion rooms, staff reading room, and video rooms.

title: RGMCET Library Digital Resources
content: RGMCET Central Library provides access to major digital resources including IEEE Xplore, Taylor and Francis, NLIST, DELNET, J-Gate Plus, National Digital Library of India, and NPTEL video lectures.
memberships: NDL National Digital Library of India

title: Library Working Hours and Borrowing Rules
content: The Central Library operates on all working days with defined borrowing and circulation policies.

title: Library General Rules and Regulations
content: Library users must follow strict discipline and borrowing rules while using the RGMCET Central Library.
rules: Wearing ID card is compulsory inside the library.
Entry in visitors register is mandatory.
No eatables or drinks allowed inside.
Books will be issued subject to availability only.
No sub-lending of books is permitted.
Personal books or printed material are not allowed inside.
Reference books, newspapers, magazines, and journals cannot be taken outside.
loss_policy: Loss of books must be reported immediately to the librarian.
Borrower must replace the lost book with a similar copy.
If not replaced in time, twice the cost plus fine will be charged.

title: RGMCET College Transportation Services
content: RGMCET operates college bus services from major nearby towns to the campus on all working days. Students opting for transportation must pay the prescribed bus fee at the beginning of each academic year.
service_notes: Bus services operate on all working days.
Students must pay transportation fees as per college norms.
Routes cover major towns around Nandyal.
